title: Getting Started with Next.js
content: Next.js is a React framework that enables server-side rendering and static site generation. In this post, we'll explore the basics of setting up a Next.js project and creating your first pages.

title: Understanding REST APIs
content: REST APIs are the backbone of modern web applications. Learn about HTTP methods, status codes, and best practices for designing RESTful endpoints.
